combos.hyphen: Insert a hyphen without leaving the alpha layer.
combos.equal: Insert an equals sign without leaving the alpha layer.
combos.copy_page_url: Send the browser shortcut that copies the current page URL.
combos.kana: Switch the host OS to the Japanese kana input mode.
combos.ei: Switch the host OS back to direct or alphanumeric input.
combos.l_click: Two-key chord for a left mouse click.
combos.r_click: Two-key chord for a right mouse click.

macros.to_layer_0: Helper macro used by the layer-tap behavior to return to layer 0 while forwarding the tapped key.
macros.alt_and_to_layer: Hold Left Alt, enable the requested layer, send Tab, then release both. This powers the custom Alt-plus-layer behavior.
macros.mkp_exit_AML: Press the requested mouse button, wait for release, tap it again, then jump back to layer 6.
